title: ArticleDraft
description: Writer Agent output — structured article draft with QA-friendly metadata.

topic.description: Article topic as passed to the Writer Agent.

working_title.description: Working title from the brief (may differ from final H1).

primary_keyword.description: Primary SEO keyword from the brief.

search_intent.description: Dominant search intent from the brief (informational / commercial_investigation / transactional).

product_fit.description: How strongly the JVL Echo product fits this article topic.

draft_markdown.description: Full assembled article in markdown — H1 + intro + all sections.

claims_to_verify.description: Claims in the draft requiring business confirmation or external sourcing before publishing.

source_inputs_used.description: Which upstream inputs were provided to the Writer Agent.

risks_to_review.description: Potential issues flagged for human review: tone drift, product over-mention, unsupported claims, etc.

internal_links_used.description: Internal link paths included in the draft.

todos.description: Open items deferred to human review or downstream agents.
